title: Poove Poove Penpoove Song Lyrics Once More

Poove poove pen poove
en poojaiku vara vendum(2)

nam kadhal vazha vendum
nammai kaatrum vazhtha vendum
nee vidum moochile
naan konjam vazhgiren

Poove poove pen poove
un poojaiku vara vendum

nam kadhal vazha vendum
nammai kaatrum vazhtha vendum
nee vidum moochile
naan konjam vazhgiren

adi eththanai kodi

vergalai pole
unnidam thaluvi
naan vazhndhida vanthen

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and the desire for togetherness, capturing the essence of romantic relationships.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Once More, the song highlights a pivotal moment of emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by the renowned K.S. Chithra, with music composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on July 4, 1997.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Poove Poove Penpoove, the lyrics beautifully convey the emotions of love and devotion, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. The song encapsulates the longing and affection between lovers, resonating deeply with listeners. Its soothing melody and heartfelt delivery evoke a sense of nostalgia, reminding us of cherished moments in love. This timeless classic continues to be a favorite for weddings and anniversaries, celebrating the beauty of relationships.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Poove Poove Penpoove is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and longing, beautifully rendered by the legendary K.S. Chithra. This enchanting song from the movie Once More resonates with anyone who has ever experienced the sweetness of romance. With its heartfelt lyrics by Vairamuthu and the soulful composition by Deva, this track is sure to tug at your heartstrings.
stanzaMeanings: The flower, the flower, the girl flower should come for my worship.
Our love should flourish, we should be praised by the world, in your absence, I live a little.
There is no love without people, without feelings.
The flower, the flower, the girl flower should come for my worship.
Our love should flourish, we should be praised by the world, in your absence, I live a little.
There is no love without people, without feelings.
The flower, the flower, the girl flower.
In love's embrace, how many years should we live together?
If I am separated from you for a moment, my life will fade away.
Even if I live for half a moment, it will feel like a year.
There is no love without people, without feelings.
The flower, the flower, the girl flower.
Like the earth touching the sky, I have come to live with you.
For a hundred years, you and I should live together, the poets of the past should sing for us again.
There is no love without people, without feelings.
The flower, the flower, the girl flower should come for my worship.
Our love should flourish, we should be praised by the world, in your absence, I live a little.
There is no love without people, without feelings.
The flower, the flower, the girl flower.
